origin

Careers at UD Trucks

Open Positions

WHY WORK FOR US?

WE INVEST IN OUR PEOPLE

We offer and encourage our people various learning opportunities and training. Our colleagues are in the drivers seat of their learning and​ development paths and are always supported during this journey.

WE ARE A MODERN CHALLENGER

We provide the opportunity for our people to be part of an innovative business that dares to embrace change and challenge. All the way from the modern technologies we use to our innovative ways of working.​

WE HAVE A TRULY DIVERSE & FRIENDLY CULTURE

We are extremely proud of the diverse, inclusive and friendly culture that​ we've cultivated at UD Trucks. We hold regular events, activities and encourage open communication across various platforms and voluntary networks.

WE OFFER CAREER DEVELOPMENT OPPORTUNITIES 

We say that our people​ are in the driver seats of​ their careers, meaning​ that our colleagues can​ follow their own desired​ paths. Our people receive global exposure and growth opportunities, backed up by our excellent internal mobility system.

WE PROMOTE WORK LIFE BALANCE

We offer flexibility with​ trust. Our people have​ the opportunity to work​ remotely. Additionally,​ we have adopted a​ flexible working hour​ system, and we actively​ encourage our colleagues to maintain​ an excellent work/life balance.​

WHAT DOES LIFE AT UD TRUCKS LOOK LIKE?
We drive on a planet alive with diversity
Flexibility with Trust
Diverse & Friendly Culture
